## Summary

<!-- Describe the problem, outcome, and important trade-offs. Link the Issue or RFC when applicable. -->

## Testing

<!-- List exact commands and results. Explain any check that was not run locally. -->

- [ ] Focused tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Relevant full Go, Console, OpenAPI, integration, or Compose gates pass.

## Documentation

- [ ] User-facing behavior and examples are updated.
- [ ] OpenAPI, router behavior, generated clients, and API docs remain synchronized.
- [ ] No documentation change is required; the reason is explained above.

## Security

- [ ] Secrets, credentials, private data, and production traces are not included.
- [ ] Authorization, tenant boundaries, logging, and dependency risks were reviewed.
- [ ] No security impact; the reason is explained above.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Public API, Go SDK, configuration, storage, and generated-artifact impact is described.
- [ ] Breaking changes include deprecation or migration guidance.
- [ ] No compatibility impact; the reason is explained above.

## Maturity

- [ ] Capability maturity remains accurate in the manifest, OpenAPI, generated artifacts, and docs.
- [ ] Any `experimental` / `beta` / `stable` change is explicitly described.
- [ ] No maturity impact; the reason is explained above.
